nasb.text: Train up a child in the way he should go, Even when he is old he will not depart from it.

esv.text: Train up a child in the way he should go; even when he is old he will not depart from it.

cnv.text: 教養孩童走他當行的路， 就是到老，他也不會偏離。

ccb.text: 教导孩童走正路， 他到老也不偏离。

csbs.text: 训练孩童走当行的路， 就是到老，他也不偏离。
